api: Microsoft Advertising (Bing Ads) v13 Customer Management and Campaign Management REST APIs
scope: Tier-3 native read scope: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (accounts, users, campaigns, ad_groups, ads), matching internal/connectors/bing-ads's exact routing table. Microsoft Advertising's broader Bulk service, Reporting service, Ad Insight service, keyword, and mutation surfaces remain excluded because this native connector is read-only and its hand-written implementation is scoped to the Customer Management and Campaign Management query routes below. Every covered/excluded READ entry below is declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is always POST for these '.../Query'-style endpoints) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design SS E.1 rule 4) -- matching monday's identical convention for its GraphQL-over-POST surface. Genuine mutation endpoints (AddCampaigns/UpdateAdGroups/DeleteAds) keep their real wire verb since they are excluded, not covered.

excluded.reason: customer listing is not read by legacy and would require a new native reader path beyond the 5-stream parity scope
keyword listing is not read by legacy and would require an additional campaign-management native reader path
campaign creation is a mutation and bing-ads is read-only here (legacy Write returns ErrUnsupportedOperation)
ad-group update is a mutation and bing-ads is read-only here
destructive mutation; out of scope, bing-ads is read-only in this migration
async report-download jobs are not read by legacy and require polling/download behavior outside this native reader's query-route scope
bulk upload/download is file-based rather than JSON record data and is not read by legacy
